body_transformation: The rounded bulbous body now glows with a deep violet translucency, revealing swirling crimson mist currents within its core. Spiky protrusions transform into jagged, ebony-black shards that emit faint pale silver luminescence along their edges. Claw-like appendages become semi-transparent, with ghostly white energy bleeding from their tips. The bone-like chest structure dissolves into faint, swirling mist, while the curved tail tip curls into a tattered, wispy vapor trail that fades into the surrounding air.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered shadowy vapor trailing ghostly white mist and crimson energy currents.
